image:image.image:title: HSK-1 Directions Cheatsheet
image:image.image:caption: East, west, left, right, in front of, behind — orienting in space.

image:image.image:title: HSK-1 Question Words Cheatsheet
image:image.image:caption: Who, what, where, when, why, how — the WH and 怎么 paradigm.

image:image.image:title: HSK-1 Reading the Clock Cheatsheet
image:image.image:caption: 点, 分, 半, 刻 — the four parts of telling time.

image:image.image:title: HSK-1 Reading Dates Cheatsheet
image:image.image:caption: Year, month, day, weekday — and how 号 swaps in for 日 in speech.

image:image.image:title: HSK-1 Counting to 10,000 Cheatsheet
image:image.image:caption: Tens, hundreds, thousands, and the jump to 万.

image:image.image:title: HSK-1 Times of Day Cheatsheet
image:image.image:caption: 早上, 中午, 下午, 晚上 — naming the blocks of the day.
